characters: A dedicated healer who diagnoses illness and mends the body.
A brave first responder who rushes toward danger to save lives.
A code-writing problem-solver who builds things in the digital world.
A culinary artist who transforms ingredients into memorable meals.
A truth-seeking reporter who chases stories wherever they lead.
A disciplined competitor who pushes the limits of physical ability.
A sharp-minded investigator who follows clues to uncover the truth.
A visionary designer who shapes the buildings people live in.
